Thank You
OUR VISION
Anchored in excellence and focused on students, Christopher Newport University aspires to be the nation’s premier regional public university, offering an innovative education embedded in the liberal arts that advances the values of honor, service, scholarship, and leadership to empower graduates to lead lives of significance.
FROM THE PRESIDENT
Christopher Newport could not count on modern day electronics when he departed England and sailed across the Atlantic, reaching the Virginia coast in 1607. He had to plot his course with the most rudimentary tools imaginable - a sextant, an hourglass, a leadline, and a compass. As we plot the course of Christopher Newport University, we have sophisticated tools at hand, but what we really need and can wholly count on is a good compass. This is our Compass.
read more
FROM THE PRESIDENT
Christopher Newport could not count on modern day electronics when he departed England and sailed across the Atlantic, reaching the Virginia coast in 1607. He had to plot his course with the most rudimentary tools imaginable - a sextant, an hourglass, a leadline, and a compass. As we plot the course of Christopher Newport University, we have sophisticated tools at hand, but what we really need and can wholly count on is a good compass. This is our Compass.
A compass indicates direction. That is what our Compass does. It points the way and creates alignment for every member of our community. One direction is not more important than another. All will be needed. And a compass will not reveal the best conveyance to follow its points, whether traveling by ship or the power of a unified community. We must decide.
The process of determining our Compass orientation has unquestionably united and aligned us in a common cause. Thank you to the hundreds of people across every part of our community who contributed ideas, attended information sessions, and helped us define the Compass points, goals and objectives. And, thank you to the Board of Visitors for supporting the initiative and offering invaluable insight along the way. From the start, we have attempted to be transparent and inclusive, and the pages that follow result from the good work of our community.
Although a compass can guide us as we set sail, it will not tell us when we have reached the destination. The next step in our journey is to implement tactics to accomplish our goals and objectives and set the metrics that will measure our progress. Key to this step will be assessing our resources and how they can best be utilized.
Our Compass is not a catalog in that it does not, and cannot, describe the many important activities already being done with excellence across campus. Those activities remain vital to our collective success and provide our foundation.
The Compass tells us where we are heading from 2025 to 2030. We will advance the power and promise of an education embedded in the liberal arts. We will connect with our community. We will create a stronger culture of inclusion and belonging. We will build a foundation so that our beloved University can thrive.
The Compass will ensure our sails are full and our course is steady as we continue to serve the students of the Commonwealth and beyond, preparing them to lead lives of significance.
I am honored and excited to be joining you on this journey. This is our time to navigate Christopher Newport into the future.
Go Captains!
President Kelly describes the Compass in this video of a presentation to the CNU community
FROM THE PRESIDENT
ADVANCE THE POWER AND PROMISE OF AN EDUCATION EMBEDDED IN THE LIBERAL ARTS
Students will realize strong, enduring value from a comprehensive liberal arts education anchored in excellence that prepares them to understand contemporary challenges, solve complex problems, think critically, adapt to changing professional demands and career opportunities, develop fully as individuals, and become engaged citizens. A student-focused experience prepares students to flourish for a lifetime, opening their minds to new ideas.
ADVANCE
CONNECT WITH OUR COMMUNITY
As a regional public university, Christopher Newport will enhance the overall quality of life in the Peninsula, Hampton Roads and the Commonwealth. CNU will integrate with the community as an educational, cultural, societal, and economic hub of excellence.
CONNECT
CREATE A STRONGER CULTURE OF INCLUSION AND BELONGING
Christopher Newport University will provide opportunities and embrace all who wish to belong and thrive in a community committed to inclusion, accessibility, and excellence. This community will be grounded in our core values of honor, scholarship, service, and leadership.
CREATE
BUILD A FOUNDATION TO THRIVE
Christopher Newport will develop sufficient public and private financial resources to achieve its mission. CNU will invest in recruiting, retaining, and developing its students, faculty, and staff. CNU will acquire sufficient endowment funding to provide scholarships to enroll prospective students and support endowed faculty chairs.
BUILD
A Fresh Look At The Impact Of Frederick Douglass
Dr. Benjamin Lynerd’s new book examines abolitionists’ writings on politics and freedom
Writing the Book on Neuroscience
Two Captains produce children’s guide to the brain

metadata.constitutional_notes: Curated as constitutional evidence because CNU evaluates new proposals through their consistency with the Strategic Compass. The four canonical Compass directions are Advance, Connect, Create, and Build.
